mcp_tools.name: memory_mcp
mcp_tools.description: Persistent knowledge graph for retrieving organizational context, past documentation patterns, audience profiles, and terminology preferences. Used to inform plan design with institutional knowledge.

mcp_tools.name: filesystem_mcp
mcp_tools.description: Local filesystem access for reading evidence packs, handoff payloads, and writing documentation plans.

mcp_tools.name: template_library
mcp_tools.description: Access to the organizational documentation template library. Provides template definitions with section structures, audience defaults, and formatting guidelines for each document type.

internal_tools.name: get_templates
internal_tools.description: Retrieve one or more documentation templates from the template library. Returns the full template definition including sections, audience defaults, and formatting rules.

doc_type.description: Specific doc type to retrieve. If omitted, returns all templates.

search_query.description: Fuzzy search across template names and descriptions.

include_examples.description: Whether to include example plans based on each template.

internal_tools.name: infer_doc_type
internal_tools.description: Analyze job context and evidence pack to determine the most appropriate document type. Uses heuristics based on task keywords, evidence patterns, and requester context.

job_context.description: The job context from the handoff payload.

evidence_summary.description: The summary field from the evidence pack.

doc_type_hint.description: Optional hint from the job context.

internal_tools.name: create_plan
internal_tools.description: Assemble the final documentation plan from all components: doc type, audience analysis, section outline, missing inputs, and acceptance checklist. Validates the plan structure and writes to disk.
